watermark_template.description: Watermark text for skill output. Placeholders: {skillName}.

author.description: Attribution author (e.g. Java @author tag). Per-skill `author` overrides this.

skills.description: Per-skill overrides, keyed by skill name (review-code, create-tests, …).

watermark_template.description: Overrides the top-level watermark_template for this skill.

author.description: Overrides the top-level author for this skill.
